message:
fix(daemon): use rpc.ShortSocketPath for daemon status/health/metrics

showDaemonStatus, showDaemonHealth, showDaemonMetrics, and
showDaemonStatusReport hardcoded filepath.Join(beadsDir, "bd.sock")
which fails for workspaces with long paths where the daemon listens on
/tmp/beads-{hash}/bd.sock. Use rpc.ShortSocketPath(workspacePath)
to compute the correct socket path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
